_README: INDEX-ONLY SNIPPET — DO NOT DEPLOY AS-IS.
This file declares only the .indexOn entries needed by the backend's
order_by_child queries. It intentionally contains NO .read/.write rules.
Firebase defaults access rules to DENY when they are absent, so deploying
this verbatim would lock out the frontend client SDK.
ACTION REQUIRED: merge the .indexOn entries below into your project's
existing access rules (Firebase Console -> Realtime Database -> Rules,
or `firebase deploy --only database` after combining with current rules).
The Admin SDK used by the backend bypasses rules entirely, so these
indexes only matter for query performance — but without them the
order_by_child queries below emit 'Index not defined' warnings and can
